docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF HANOCH FELDMAN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AFFIRM HOLDINGS, INC. IS PRESENT. APPEARING BY ZOOM FOR THE DEFENDANT IS LAUREN ORTEGO. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM LAUREN ORTEGO FILED BY DEFENDANT AFFIRM HOLDINGS, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY FELDMAN, HANOCH AS TO DEFENDANT AFFIRM HOLDINGS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON JAN 07, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) TO HANOCH FELDMAN RETURN TO SENDER -INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR LAUREN ORTEGO FILED BY DEFENDANT AFFIRM HOLDINGS, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON JAN 20, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION TO HANOCH FELMANN RETURN TO SENDER - REFUSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
